0.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibroatelectasis and scarring in the right middle lobe

1.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibroatelectasis and scarring in the left upper lobe inferior lingular segment

2.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibroatelectasis and scarring more prominently in the basal segments of both lower lobes

3.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific parenchymal nodules in both lungs
